call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Alice, thanks for taking my call. My name is John with Financial Solutions. I see you filled out a form online regarding our Signature Credit Card. Um, are you still interested? 
Alice: Yeah, I think so. I'm looking to transfer a balance, actually. 
Agent: Great! We can definitely help with that. We're pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 15.99% with a 0% introductory balance transfer for the first six months. Does that sound appealing? 
Alice: Hmm, 15.99%... that's not terrible. What are the fees? 
Agent: There's a balance transfer fee of 3%, but that's pretty standard. And no annual fee, of course. 
Alice: Okay. And what's the credit limit? 
Agent: $5,000, as mentioned. We can review that after six months based on your usage. 
Alice: Alright, sounds good. Let's do it. 
Agent: Fantastic! Just need to verify a few details...

Agent: Hello, Mr. Williams? My name is Sarah calling from Financial Solutions. We have a great offer on a Personal Loan. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't ask for this. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a $10,000 Personal Loan at 10.5%. 
Robert: I'm retired. I don't need a loan. And frankly, I don't appreciate these calls. 
Agent: I understand, sir. But this could help with… 
Robert: No, it couldn't. I'm perfectly fine. Don't call me again. *click*

Agent: Hi Emily, this is David from Financial Solutions. I'm calling about our Signature Credit Card. I understand you were referred by a partner. 
Emily: Oh, yeah, my friend Sarah mentioned it. She said it had good rewards. 
Agent: Absolutely! We're pre-approving you for an $8,000 Signature Credit Card at 14.24% with 2% cashback on all purchases. 
Emily: That sounds pretty good. What about travel insurance? 
Agent: It includes travel accident insurance and baggage delay coverage. We also have options to add more comprehensive travel insurance for a small monthly fee. 
Emily: Hmm. Okay. What's the APR on cash advances? 
Agent: The APR on cash advances is 25.99%. We always recommend using the card for purchases whenever possible. 
Emily: Right, of course. So, 2% cashback… is that capped? 
Agent: There's a $5,000 quarterly cap on cashback earnings. 
Emily: Okay. I think I'm ready to apply. 
Agent: Wonderful! Let's get started...

Agent: Hi Michael, this is Lisa from Financial Solutions. I see you applied for a Personal Loan online. 
Michael: Yeah, I did. I need to consolidate some debt. 
Agent: We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. 
Michael: Okay, that sounds… reasonable. What are the terms? 
Agent: 60 months. Your monthly payment would be approximately $330. 
Michael: And are there any origination fees? 
Agent: Yes, there's a one-time origination fee of 2% of the loan amount, so $300 in your case. 
Michael: Ugh, fees. Always fees. 
Agent: I understand your frustration, sir. It helps cover the costs of processing the loan. We also offer a discount if you enroll in autopay. 
Michael: Autopay? What if I can't make a payment one month? 
Agent: We can discuss hardship options if that happens. We're here to work with you. 
Michael: Okay. And what about prepayment penalties? 
Agent: There are no prepayment penalties. You can pay off the loan early without any extra charges. 
Michael: Alright. That's good. I think I'm willing to proceed. 
Agent: Excellent! Let's get the application finalized...

Agent: Hello, Jessica? This is Mark from Financial Solutions. We're offering a great deal on our Signature Credit Card. 
Jessica: You guys called me yesterday! I told you I wasn't interested! Get my number off your list! 
Agent: I apologize for the inconvenience, ma'am. We're pre-approving you for a $3,000 Signature Credit Card at 18.99%... 
Jessica: *Interrupting* No! Just stop calling me! *click*

Agent: Hi David, this is Sarah from Financial Solutions. Welcome back! I see you're interested in a Personal Loan. 
David: Yes, I am. I'm looking to renovate my kitchen. 
Agent: Excellent! We're pre-approving you for a $20,000 Personal Loan at 9.75%. 
David: That sounds good. I've been looking at a few options. What's your rate compared to, say, Bank of America? 
Agent: Bank of America's rates for similar loans are currently around 11.25%, and their origination fees are higher. We offer a lower rate and a more streamlined application process. 
David: Hmm, okay. What are your fees? 
Agent: A one-time origination fee of 1.5%, so $300 in your case. No prepayment penalties. 
David: And what's the loan term? 
Agent: We offer terms from 24 to 72 months. What term are you looking for? 
David: I think 60 months would be good. 
Agent: Perfect. Your monthly payment would be approximately $387. 
David: Alright. I think I'm ready to move forward. 
Agent: Wonderful! Let's get started with the application...

Agent: Hi Linda, this is David from Financial Solutions. I'm calling about our Signature Credit Card. I understand you were referred by a partner. 
Linda: Oh, yes, my coworker mentioned it. She said it had a good rewards program. 
Agent: Absolutely! We're pre-approving you for a $6,000 Signature Credit Card at 16.49% with 1.5% cashback on all purchases. 
Linda: That sounds interesting. What's the credit limit after the initial $6,000? 
Agent: We can review that after six months based on your usage and payment history. We can potentially increase it. 
Linda: Okay. And what about balance transfers? 
Agent: We offer a 0% introductory rate on balance transfers for the first 12 months, with a 5% balance transfer fee. 
Linda: Hmm. I need to think about it. I have a few other cards I'm considering. 
Agent: Of course. I can send you an email with all the details, including a comparison chart. Would that be helpful? 
Linda: Yes, please. That would be great. 
Agent: Wonderful! I'll send that over right away. Thank you for your time, Linda.

Agent: Hello, Kevin? This is Mark from Financial Solutions. We're offering a Personal Loan... 
Kevin: Where did you get my number? I didn't authorize this. *click*

Agent: Hi Patricia, this is Lisa from Financial Solutions. I see you inquired about a Personal Loan online. 
Patricia: Oh, yes, dear. My grandson helped me with the computer. I need a little help with some medical bills. 
Agent: We can definitely help with that. We're pre-approving you for a $7,500 Personal Loan at 11.75%. 
Patricia: 11.75? What does that mean, dear? 
Agent: That's the annual interest rate. It means you'll pay 11.75% on the loan amount each year. 
Patricia: Oh. Could you repeat that, please? I didn't quite catch it. 
Agent: Certainly. 11.75% annual interest rate. Your monthly payment would be approximately $175. 
Patricia: And how long would I be paying? 
Agent: We offer terms from 24 to 60 months. We can tailor it to your budget. 
Patricia: Oh my. It's all a bit confusing. 
Agent: I understand. We can send you a detailed breakdown of the loan terms in an email. Would that be helpful? 
Patricia: Yes, dear. That would be wonderful. Thank you so much. 
Agent: You're very welcome. I'll send that over right away.

Agent: Hi Brandon, this is John with Financial Solutions. I'm calling about our Signature Credit Card. I understand you were referred by a partner. 
Brandon: Yeah, a friend told me about it. I'm looking for a card with good travel rewards. 
Agent: Excellent! We're pre-approving you for a $4,000 Signature Credit Card at 17.24% with 2x points on travel and dining. 
Brandon: 17.24%? That's a little high, isn't it? 
Agent: It is slightly higher, but the rewards program is very competitive. Plus, we have a 0% introductory APR for the first six months. 
Brandon: Okay, that's good. What's the annual fee? 
Agent: $95 per year. 
Brandon: Hmm. Okay. I think I'm willing to give it a shot. 
Agent: Fantastic! Let's get the application started. I just need to verify a few details...
